productDisplayName: Puma Men Race Luminous 3HD Silver green Black Watches
description: Stylish and comfortable, this motorsport inspired wrist watch from puma is designed with a metal case and a PU strap thereby  giving a sleek look. The perfect accessory for all urban trend setters, this watch is great for everyday casual wear.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a metal tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo below 12 o& rsquo clock marking12, 6 and 9 o'clock marked boldlySmaller markings showing the hours, minutes, seconds and nano secondsIlluminator strips on the dialTachymeter scale on the outermost ring of the dialQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters
